value.0:
Flag standards are often used on the battlefield as a rallying point for soldiers.

This flag bears the symbol of Helm, the god of guardians and protectors, Helm is the epitome of the guardian, the watcher, and has in years past been
greatly venerated by those who need to remain watchful for evil at their doorsteps. Helm is ever-vigilant, and embodies the spirit of lawful neutrality. Helm's Symbol is an open eye painted onto a gauntlet.

Helm teaches that one must be ever vigilant, ever aware, ever prepared for one's enemies. He also serves who stands and waits and watches carefully. Careful planning will always defeat rushed actions in the end.
Flag standards are often used on the battlefield as a rallying point for soldiers.
